text.title: growth-product-hunt-launch Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for growth-product-hunt-launch as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Launching without a pre-built email list or community.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without warm contacts to drive early upvote velocity, the listing never reaches the first page. Building the list before launch is more important than the launch date itself.

failure-mode.description: Launching on a weekend or during a major tech event.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Weekends have fewer active PH users; major events dominate attention. Tuesdays through Thursdays have the highest active user counts and lowest competition.

failure-mode.description: First comment drafted as corporate marketing copy.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: PH community values authenticity. A polished, corporate first comment reduces maker credibility. Write in first-person casual voice and review for authenticity before posting.

failure-mode.description: Asking for upvotes directly or including "upvote us" or "share with your network" in launch copy.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Asking for upvotes directly is a PH TOS violation and, if flagged, can result in removal of the listing. Let the product quality drive upvotes organically.
